title: Lighter model-folder refresh: /object_info instead of full ComfyUI restart for file-only changes
description: Settings model-folder changes currently flag comfyNeedsRestart (full ComfyUI stop/start). A FILE add/remove in an existing root only needs a /object_info refresh (cache reseed), no restart. Distinguish root-path/folder changes (restart) vs file changes (refresh). See brief.md
